raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"food","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"I like the idea of serving bruschetta as an appetizer.","distilled_fact":"The user likes the idea of serving bruschetta as an appetizer."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"personal_activity","confidence":0.86,"matched_text":"I recently reorganized my kitchen cabinets, and it's made a huge difference in terms of finding what I need when I need it.","distilled_fact":"The user recently reorganized the user's kitchen cabinets."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"personal_activity","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"I also replaced the kitchen faucet a couple of weeks ago, which was leaking for months, and it's amazing how much of a difference it's made in terms of water waste and the overall look of the kitchen.","distilled_fact":"The user replaced the kitchen faucet a couple of weeks ago."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"appliance","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"I also replaced the kitchen faucet a couple of weeks ago, which was leaking for months, and it's amazing how much of a difference it's made in terms of water waste and the overall look of the kitchen.","distilled_fact":"The kitchen faucet had been leaking for months before it was replaced."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"preference","confidence":0.79,"matched_text":"what are some good Italian wines that would pair well with the main courses?","distilled_fact":"The user wants Italian wines that would pair well with the main courses at the dinner party."}]}
